description_long: This is a cylindrical metal bollard painted with alternating black and yellow horizontal stripes, designed for high visibility in urban environments. The bollard stands vertically on a square metal base plate, which is bolted to the ground for stability. The surface shows some minor scuffs and wear, indicating outdoor use and exposure to the elements. The cap is rounded and smooth, with no visible openings or decorative features. The alternating color bands serve as a visual warning, making it effective for traffic control or pedestrian safety. There are no chains, connectors, or additional attachments visible on the bollard.
description: A tall, cylindrical metal bollard with alternating black and yellow stripes, mounted on a square base plate and designed for high visibility and urban safety.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the bollard, with clear visibility of the alternating black and yellow stripes and the square base plate.
description_view_1: Side view with similar features, but minor surface scuffs and bolt details on the base are more visible.
description_view_2: Another side view, showing the cylindrical shape and the consistent pattern of stripes, with less visible wear.
description_view_3: Rear view, highlighting the uniformity of the stripes and the square base, with some minor marks on the surface.
